markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Catch-up and onboarding discussion between Jimmy S. (GrowthX Labs) and Mara Leighton (growthx.ai)](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has grown rapidly, now at \~$3.5M ARR with 12-15 clients](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)
  - [Jimmy's role has evolved from leading SEO to building new work streams (link building, outbound)](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Mara is joining to potentially lead case study/editorial-focused initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Client expectations management and education are ongoing challenges, especially for higher-priced engagements](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Evolution and Current State

  - [Started with Marcel's webinars and 25-30 clients](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Grew to 12-15 clients by Nov/Dec, now at \~$3.5M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=99.0)
  - [Shifted from using third-party tools to custom backend](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)
  - [Implemented pod structure for client management](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=108.0)
  - [Recently raised Series A funding](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)

### Jimmy's Role and New Work Streams

  - [Transitioned from leading SEO to building new revenue streams](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Link building: 2-month-old work stream, already 10% of revenue](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Outbound: Experimenting with high-volume email outreach](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=212.0)
  - [Process for new work streams:](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=632.0)
    1.  Convince Marcel to sell it
    2.  Acquire initial clients
    3.  Develop and refine processes
    4.  Scale up quickly (e.g., 2 to 10 clients in 2-3 months)

### Client Management and Expectations

  - [Higher-priced engagements ($15k-$20k/month) often expect end-to-end solutions](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [Educating clients on realistic timelines and SEO vs. conversion responsibilities](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [Some accounts (e.g., Jackie's) struggling with alignment and results after 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [Emphasis on week-over-week and month-over-month growth metrics](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [Leveraging team's expertise and past successes in sales pitches](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1186.0)

### Mara's Onboarding and Potential Focus

  - [Currently familiarizing with documentation and SEO fundamentals](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Likely to be assigned clients with editorial focus, aligning with her background](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Potential to lead case study initiatives and new content-focused work streams](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [Opportunity to contribute to client education and expectation management](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)

### Team Structure and Collaboration

  - [Jimmy works full-time with GrowthX but as a consultant, not traditional employee](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=363.0)
  - [Bruno (Marcel's brother) works on the sales side](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
  - [Jason joining to lead top-of-funnel pipeline building](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mara to continue onboarding, focusing on building SEO context](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=421.0)
  - [Explore creation of educational resources for clients to manage expectations](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=952.0)
  - [Investigate availability of GrowthX branded graphics for team use (e.g., LinkedIn banners)](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1369.0)
  - [Mara to watch client call recordings for additional context](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
  - [Continue discussions on potential case study and editorial initiatives](https://fathom.video/share/4ySyVtvGDM4UnutN5A2p_6zxP5gc49V2?tab=summary&timestamp=1755.0)
